system_answer: Caroline has faced several changes during her transition journey, including starting her transition three years ago, moving from her home country and building a supportive friend network, exploring adoption, attending empowering community events, and going through a tough process of finding self-acceptance. She has also received invaluable help from friends, family, and role models throughout this journey.
